name: Beige Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil an 8-inch square pan.
2. Stir together the egg, brown sugar, and vanilla extract in a bowl until well combined.
3. Add the flour, baking soda, and salt to the mixture; stir until just combined.
4. Fold in the chopped walnuts, if using.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread it evenly.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes, or until the centers are set but still soft.
7. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into 2-inch squares.
Makes 16 bars
